starter_formal_app.label: Formal Application
starter_formal_app.subject: Application — {{role_name|the open role}} at {{company}}
starter_formal_app.initialMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

I'd like to apply for the {{role_name|open role}} at {{company}}. My background looks like a strong fit, and I've attached my resume for your review.

Happy to share more context whenever it's useful.
starter_formal_app.follow1Msg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Following up on my note about the {{role_name|open role}} at {{company}}. Is there a good time this week or next for a short call?
starter_formal_app.lastFollowMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

One last note — if the timing isn't right at {{company}}, no problem. Happy to circle back next quarter.

starter_friendly_intro.label: Friendly Intro
starter_friendly_intro.subject: Quick intro — would love to connect
starter_friendly_intro.initialMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

I've been following {{company}} and wanted to introduce myself. I think there's overlap between what you're building and what I work on.

Open to a quick chat?
starter_friendly_intro.follow1Msg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Bumping this up. Any 15-min window that works for you in the next week or two?
starter_friendly_intro.lastFollowMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Last note from me — if now isn't the right time, no worries. I'll keep an eye on {{company}}.

starter_jobpost_reply.label: Job Posting Reply
starter_jobpost_reply.subject: {{role_name|Applicant}} — applying via {{platform|your posting}}
starter_jobpost_reply.initialMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

I came across the {{role_name|open role}} posting on {{platform|your careers page}} and would like to apply. Resume attached, portfolio at {{portfolio_link|the link in my signature}}.

Open to a short conversation about the role whenever it's useful.
starter_jobpost_reply.follow1Msg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Checking in on my application for {{role_name|the open role}}. Happy to share more detail on anything that would help.
starter_jobpost_reply.lastFollowMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Final note on the {{role_name|open role}} — if the role's been filled or the timing's off, no problem.

starter_referral.label: Referral
starter_referral.subject: Referred to you — quick hello
starter_referral.initialMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

I was pointed your way regarding opportunities at {{company}}. Resume attached for context.

Would a brief call this week or next work on your side?
starter_referral.follow1Msg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Following up on the referral note. Any time this week or next that works?
starter_referral.lastFollowMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Closing the loop on this — if nothing's open at {{company}} right now, no worries.

starter_thankyou.label: Thank You (Post-Interview)
starter_thankyou.subject: Thanks for your time today
starter_thankyou.initialMsg:
Hi {{name|there}},

Thanks for the conversation today about {{role_name|the role}} at {{company}}. I enjoyed it and came away more excited about the work.

Happy to share anything else that would be useful — references, samples, additional context.
